title: InvestIQ
tagline: Investment news webapp with live market updates
description: A lightweight HTML web app that delivers curated investment news to users. Built and deployed entirely as a static site on Vercel with minimal dependencies — fast load, zero build step.
outcome: Live static webapp serving investment news updates with Vercel deployment

title: Todo PWA
tagline: Offline-first progressive web app for task management
description: A vanilla JavaScript PWA that works fully offline via a service worker and persists todos in localStorage. Supports add/edit/delete, three filter views (All / Active / Done), real-time online/offline status detection, and is installable as a standalone app on mobile and desktop.
outcome: Installable offline-first todo app with service worker caching and localStorage persistence

title: LiveWell App
tagline: AI-powered wellness platform for health, finance, and relationships
description: A Next.js PWA offering three AI-driven suites: a Health Suite with symptom checker and medication reminders, a Finance Suite with budget planner and retirement calculator, and a Relationship Suite with communication coaching and family check-ins. Designed for Thai users with a clean subscription model and offline capability.
outcome: Multi-suite AI wellness PWA with health, finance, and relationship coaching modules

title: Digital Business Card
tagline: PWA business card with QR code generation for instant contact sharing
description: A progressive web app that displays a digital business card with a built-in QR code generator. Visitors can scan the QR code to save contact details instantly. Installable as a standalone app on mobile and desktop.
outcome: Installable PWA with QR code sharing and responsive profile card layout

title: Tip Calculator
tagline: Offline-capable PWA for fast gratuity and bill splitting
description: A lightweight progressive web app for calculating tips and splitting bills. Runs fully offline via a service worker and is installable on any device — no app store required.
outcome: Installable offline-capable tip calculator with instant client-side calculations

title: Counter & Event Timer
tagline: PWA counter and countdown timer for tracking events
description: A progressive web app combining a general-purpose counter with a countdown timer for events. Works offline via service worker and installs as a standalone app.
outcome: Installable PWA with offline counter and event countdown functionality

title: Personal Budget Tracker
tagline: Offline-first PWA for tracking income, expenses, and savings
description: A vanilla JavaScript progressive web app for managing personal finances. Track income and expenses, monitor spending categories, and view balance summaries — all stored locally in the browser with offline support via service worker.
outcome: Installable offline-first budget tracker with local data persistence

title: Recipe Box Cookbook
tagline: PWA cookbook for storing and browsing personal recipes offline
description: A client-side progressive web app for managing a personal recipe collection. Add, browse, and view recipes with offline support — no server or account required. Installable as a standalone app.
outcome: Installable offline-capable recipe manager with client-side storage

title: Pomodoro Focus Timer
tagline: PWA productivity timer using the Pomodoro Technique
description: A progressive web app implementing the Pomodoro Technique — 25-minute work sessions alternating with short breaks. Runs offline via service worker and installs on any device for distraction-free focus sessions.
outcome: Installable offline Pomodoro timer for structured focus and break intervals
